Var.Name: SYSCLOCK
Var.Descr: System Date and Time Read. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

Var.Name: SYSCLOCKSET
Var.Descr: System Date and Time Write. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

Var.Name: ISEDITWITHICON
Var.Descr: Edit mode with icon (TRUE) or with blinking value (FALSE)

Var.Name: SYSLOGICALKEYS
Var.Descr: Shows the status of LOGICAL Buttons based on following values: ...

Var.Name: SYSKEYBOARD
Var.Descr: Physical Keyboard status (0 = Button RELEASED, 1 = Button PRESSED) ...

Var.Name: SYSKEYFUNCTIONS
Var.Descr: System Logical Keyboard (Needs to be cleared manually) ...

Var.Name: SYSISSIMULMODE
Var.Descr: TRUE if is simulator target running, FALSE real target is running

Var.Name: SYSWATCHDOGOCCURED
Var.Descr: TRUE if a watchdog reset occured before startup

Var.Name: SYSIMPULSECOUNTER
Var.Descr: System Impulse Counter Input 1 (read). It is a structure of type STRUCTIMPULSECOUNTER composed ...

Var.Name: SYSIMPULSECOUNTER_AS_FDI
Var.Descr: System Impulse Counter 1 as Digital Input

Var.Name: SYSIMPULSECOUNTER_RESETCOUNTER
Var.Descr: Reset sysImpulseCounter.counter of System Impulse Counter Input 1

Var.Name: SYSIMPULSECOUNTER2
Var.Descr: System Impulse Counter Input 2 (read). It is a structure of type STRUCTIMPULSECOUNTER composed ...

Var.Name: SYSIMPULSECOUNTER_AS_FDI2
Var.Descr: System Impulse Counter 2 as Digital Input

Var.Name: SYSIMPULSECOUNTER_RESETCOUNTER2
Var.Descr: Reset sysImpulseCounter.counter of System Impulse Counter Input 2

Var.Name: SYSRETAINPARS
Var.Descr: System retain parameters array. It is saved in persistent memory at every modification. Init values are 0.

Var.Name: SYSTSKBCKMAXEXETIME
Var.Descr: System Background's Task Max Execution Time (us)

Var.Name: SYSTSKTMDMAXEXETIME
Var.Descr: System Timed's Task Max Execution Time (us)

Var.Name: SYSTSKSLOWMAXEXETIME
Var.Descr: System Slow's Task Max Execution Time (us)

Var.Name: SYSUSBCOMMAND
Var.Descr: System command to upload/download to/from USB-Host ...

Var.Name: SYSUSBSTATUS
Var.Descr: System status of operation on USB-Host ...

Var.Name: SYSUSBPARAMDATMINADDRESS
Var.Descr: Minimum modbus address into PARAM.DAT file downloaded from controller to USB-Host

Var.Name: SYSUSBPARAMDATMAXADDRESS
Var.Descr: Maximum modbus address into PARAM.DAT file downloaded from controller to USB-Host

Var.Name: SYSCOPSSTATUS
Var.Descr: System CANopen Slave Diagno. It is a structure of type COPS_STATUS_STRUCT

VarI.Name: CALLBACKTYPE
VarI.Descr: Callback type passed to the callback function

VarI.Name: INFO
VarI.Descr: Info passed to the callback function

Var.Name: TIMSTART
Var.Descr: Time value at start of counting

VarI.Name: POS
VarI.Descr: Position of the value inside the enumerative type

VarO.Name: MAXPOS
VarO.Descr: Max position inside the enumerative type

VarI.Name: POS
VarI.Descr: Position of the menu item inside the menu

VarI.Name: IPA
VarI.Descr: IPA of the parameter to be edited

VarI.Name: ITEMID
VarI.Descr: Index of the item to be shown

VarI.Name: LISTTYPE
VarI.Descr: List name containing the item index

VarO.Name: ISHIDDEN
VarO.Descr: True if the menu item is hidden

VarI.Name: STARTPOS
VarI.Descr: Starting position inside the parent list

VarI.Name: NITEMS
VarI.Descr: Number of items contained inside the list

VarI.Name: LISTTYPE
VarI.Descr: Type of the list to be scrolled

VarI.Name: HASALARMCHECK
VarI.Descr: Flag checking if it was found a not hidden item having an access level <= of the user's access level

VarO.Name: ITEMFOUND
VarO.Descr: TRUE if an element was found

VarO.Name: SHOWALARMFOLDER
VarO.Descr: TRUE if the alarm folder must be shown

VarI.Name: MENUITEMPOS
VarI.Descr: Position of the menu item inside its menu

VarExt.Name: ISEDITWITHICON
VarExt.Descr: Edit mode with icon (TRUE) or with blinking value (FALSE)

VarI.Name: LISTSTARTPOSITION
VarI.Descr: Starting position of the list from which the scroll shall begin

VarO.Name: $TOGGLEPLCBIOS
VarO.Descr: Toggle between PLC and BIOS fundamental states

VarExt.Name: SYSLOGICALKEYS
VarExt.Descr: Shows the status of LOGICAL Buttons based on following values: ...

VarI.Name: $TOGGLEPLCBIOS
VarI.Descr: Toggle between PLC and BIOS fundamental state

VarExt.Name: SYSLOGICALKEYS
VarExt.Descr: Shows the status of LOGICAL Buttons based on following values: ...

VarExt.Name: SYSCLOCK
VarExt.Descr: System Date and Time Read. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

VarI.Name: $TURNONCLOCKICON
VarI.Descr: Flag required to turn on the clock icon

TmpVar.Name: $$INPT$TURNONCLOCKICON
TmpVar.Descr: Flag required to turn on the clock icon

VarExt.Name: SYSCLOCK
VarExt.Descr: System Date and Time Read. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

VarI.Name: HASTIMEOUT
VarI.Descr: Flag request for a new timer

TmpVar.Name: $$INPTHASTIMEOUT
TmpVar.Descr: Flag request for a new timer

VarI.Name: PSTRUP
VarI.Descr: Message string to print on the Upper Row

VarI.Name: PSTRDN
VarI.Descr: Message string to print on the Lower Row

VarI.Name: NUMUP
VarI.Descr: Number to show on the Upper Row

VarI.Name: NUMDN
VarI.Descr: Number to show on the Lower Row

VarI.Name: PSTR
VarI.Descr: Message string to print on the LOWER Row

VarI.Name: DATA
VarI.Descr: Number to show on the LOWER Row

VarI.Name: ROWID
VarI.Descr: Row ID: 0 = Upper row, 1 = Lower row

VarI.Name: BLINKING
VarI.Descr: Blinking: 0 = Blink OFF, 1 = Blink ON, 2 = Blink FAST

VarI.Name: ALIGMENT
VarI.Descr: String Alignment: 0 = RIGHT alignment - 1 = LEFT alignment

VarI.Name: ROWID
VarI.Descr: Row ID: 0 = Upper row, 1 = Lower row

VarI.Name: ROWID
VarI.Descr: Row ID: 0 = Upper row, 1 = Lower row

VarI.Name: DOTPOS
VarI.Descr: Dot Position: 0 = No dots, 1 = Dot for DECIMAL values (123.4), 2 = Dot for CENTESIMAL values (12.34), 3 - Dot for THOUSANDTH values (1.234)

VarI.Name: BLINKING
VarI.Descr: Blinking: 0 = Blink OFF, 1 = Blink ON, 2 = Blink FAST

VarI.Name: DOTPOS
VarI.Descr: Dot Position: 0 = No dots, 1 = Dot for DECIMAL values (123.4), 2 = Dot for CENTESIMAL values (12.34), 3 - Dot for THOUSANDTH values (1.234)

VarI.Name: DOTPOS
VarI.Descr: Dot Position: 0 = No dots, 1 = Dot for DECIMAL values (123.4), 2 = Dot for CENTESIMAL values (12.34), 3 - Dot for THOUSANDTH values (1.234)

VarI.Name: ROWID
VarI.Descr: Row ID: 0 = Upper row, 1 = Lower row

VarI.Name: DECDGT
VarI.Descr: Number of decimal digits to shows (-1 means that the number is showed as is without limitations)

VarI.Name: BLINKING
VarI.Descr: Blinking: 0 = Blink OFF, 1 = Blink ON, 2 = Blink FAST

VarI.Name: DEVICEID
VarI.Descr: Device ID: 0 = LOCAL Device, 1 = REMOTE Device

VarI.Name: ROWID
VarI.Descr: Row ID: 0 = Upper row, 1 = Lower row

VarI.Name: WD_VALUE
VarI.Descr: Background task watch dog time [sec/10], 255=watch dog disabled, 0=immediate reset and PLC restart

VarI.Name: WD_VALUE
VarI.Descr: Timed task watch dog time [sec/10], 255=watch dog disabled, 0=immediate reset and PLC restart

VarI.Name: WD_VALUE
VarI.Descr: Slow timed task watch dog time [sec/10], 255=watch dog disabled, 0=immediate reset and PLC restart

VarI.Name: LEVEL
VarI.Descr: Level [0 to 65535] value is reported into message

VarExt.Name: SYSCLOCK
VarExt.Descr: System Date and Time Read. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

VarExt.Name: SYSCLOCKSET
VarExt.Descr: System Date and Time Write. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

VarExt.Name: SYSCLOCK
VarExt.Descr: System Date and Time Read. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

VarExt.Name: SYSCLOCKSET
VarExt.Descr: System Date and Time Write. It is a structure of type TypeDataTime composed by the following fields: ...

VarI.Name: IDXDATABLOCKE2
VarI.Descr: Index of datablock for E2 parameters

VarI.Name: PTRDATABLOCKE2
VarI.Descr: Address of datablock for E2 parameters

VarI.Name: NUMELEMSDATABLOCKE2
VarI.Descr: Number of elements of datablock for E2 parameters

VarI.Name: DATASIZEDATABLOCKE2
VarI.Descr: Size of an element of datablock for E2 parameters

VarI.Name: IDXDATABLOCKRAM
VarI.Descr: Index of datablock for RAM parameters

VarI.Name: PTRDATABLOCKRAM
VarI.Descr: Address of datablock for RAM parameters

VarI.Name: NUMELEMSDATABLOCKRAM
VarI.Descr: Number of elements of datablock for RAM parameters

VarI.Name: DATASIZEDATABLOCKRAM
VarI.Descr: Size of an element of datablock for RAM parameters

VarI.Name: EXTTABLESIGNATURE
VarI.Descr: Signature to reset default value if something changed

VarI.Name: BAUD
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Baudrate, refer to enumerative MbRtuBaudRate

VarI.Name: MODE
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuMode

VarI.Name: SERCFG
VarI.Descr: Serial configuration, if TRUE configure serial port using parameters in database

VarI.Name: BAUD
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Baudrate, refer to enumerative MbRtuBaudRate

VarI.Name: MODE
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuMode

VarI.Name: SERCFG
VarI.Descr: Serial configuration, if TRUE configure serial port using parameters in database

VarI.Name: RSMODE
VarI.Descr: Serial port RS Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuRSMode

VarI.Name: CHN
VarI.Descr: Modbus slave RTU channel, returned from sysMbSRtu_OpenChn

VarI.Name: BOOT
VarI.Descr: Modbus slave RTU Boot Configuration command

VarI.Name: PMBMNETLIST
VarI.Descr: Address of the net list structure

VarI.Name: NUMNODES
VarI.Descr: Number of slaves in the netlist

VarI.Name: PMBMMSGQUEUE
VarI.Descr: Address of the message queue that will be filled

VarI.Name: NUMMSG
VarI.Descr: Number of messages available for the queue

VarI.Name: MEMORYALLOCATED
VarI.Descr: Size in bytes of the memory allocated for network and queue

VarI.Name: PMBMNETLIST
VarI.Descr: Address of the net list structure

VarI.Name: NUMNODES
VarI.Descr: Number of slaves in the netlist

VarI.Name: PMBMMSGQUEUE
VarI.Descr: Address of the message queue that will be filled

VarI.Name: NUMMSG
VarI.Descr: Number of messages available for the queue

VarI.Name: MEMORYALLOCATED
VarI.Descr: Size in bytes of the memory allocated for network and queue

VarI.Name: PRM
VarI.Descr: Number of parametrization message that slave will be received

VarI.Name: PRM
VarI.Descr: Number of parametrization message that slave will be received

VarI.Name: BAUD
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Baudrate, refer to enumerative MbRtuBaudRate

VarI.Name: MODE
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuMode

VarI.Name: SERCFG
VarI.Descr: Serial configuration, if TRUE configure serial port using parameters in database

VarI.Name: BAUD
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Baudrate, refer to enumerative MbRtuBaudRate

VarI.Name: MODE
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuMode

VarI.Name: SERCFG
VarI.Descr: Serial configuration, if TRUE configure serial port using parameters in database

VarI.Name: RSMODE
VarI.Descr: Serial port RS Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuRSMode

VarI.Name: BAUD
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Baudrate, refer to enumerative MbRtuBaudRate

VarI.Name: MODE
VarI.Descr: Serial Port Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuMode

VarI.Name: SERCFG
VarI.Descr: Serial configuration, if TRUE configure serial port using parameters in database

VarI.Name: RSMODE
VarI.Descr: Serial port RS Mode, refer to enumerative MbRtuRSMode

VarI.Name: FNZ
VarI.Descr: Modbus function, refer to enumerative MbFunction

VarI.Name: MODBUS_PDU_TX_BUFFER
VarI.Descr: Modbus pdu tx buffer (for on event msg only)

VarI.Name: FNZ
VarI.Descr: Modbus function, refer to enumerative MbFunction

VarI.Name: MODBUS_PDU_TX_BUFFER
VarI.Descr: Modbus pdu tx buffer (for on event msg only)

VarI.Name: FNZ
VarI.Descr: Modbus function, refer to enumerative MbFunction

VarI.Name: MODBUS_PDU_TX_BUFFER
VarI.Descr: Modbus pdu tx buffer (for on event msg only)

VarI.Name: FNZ
VarI.Descr: Modbus function, refer to enumerative MbFunction

VarI.Name: MODBUS_PDU_TX_BUFFER
VarI.Descr: Modbus pdu tx buffer (for on event msg only)

VarI.Name: WAITBEFORESEND
VarI.Descr: Time (ms) to wait from last received message, before a new send

VarI.Name: FNZ
VarI.Descr: Modbus function, refer to enumerative MbFunction

VarI.Name: MODBUS_PDU_TX_BUFFER
VarI.Descr: Modbus pdu tx buffer (for on event msg only)

VarI.Name: BOOT
VarI.Descr: Modbus master RTU Boot Configuration command

VarI.Name: HANDLE
VarI.Descr: Modbus slave handle, returned from sysMbMRtu_GetSlaveHandle

VarI.Name: ACTIVATE
VarI.Descr: If TRUE, Slave is concurrent in communication

VarI.Name: HANDLE
VarI.Descr: Modbus slave handle, returned from sysMbMRtu_GetSlaveHandle

VarI.Name: HANDLE
VarI.Descr: Modbus slave handle, returned from sysMbMRtu_GetSlaveHandle

VarI.Name: MAXRETRIES
VarI.Descr: Max number of retries; use 16#FFFF for infinite retries

VarI.Name: HANDLE
VarI.Descr: Modbus slave handle, returned from sysMbMRtu_GetSlaveHandle

VarI.Name: DISABLEWRITE
VarI.Descr: TRUE if write commands must be disabled

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, referred to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, referred to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: NODE
VarI.Descr: Slave unique node in network, 1 to 127

VarI.Name: ADDRCOPMNETLIST
VarI.Descr: Address of the array used to manage network status

VarI.Name: ADDRCOPMNETLISTCFG
VarI.Descr: Address of tha array used to manage network (constant) configuration

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKNMTE
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_NMTE_HDLR type to manage NMTE

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKSDO
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_SDO_HDLR type to manage SDO

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKPRM
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_PRM_HDLR type to manage parametrization

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKRXPDO
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_PDO_HDLR type to manage PDO rx

VarI.Name: ADDRINPPROCIMAGE
VarI.Descr: Address of array used to store process images for input data

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKTXPDO
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_PDO_HDLR type to manage PDO tx

VarI.Name: ADDROUTPROCIMAGE
VarI.Descr: Address of array used to store process images for output data

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKPLCIN
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_PLC_HDLR type to manage PDO rx mappings

VarI.Name: ADDRWORKPLCOUT
VarI.Descr: Address of array of CopM_PLC_HDLR type to manage PDO tx mappings

VarI.Name: ADDRMEMMAPARR
VarI.Descr: Address of the memory mapping configuration array

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, refers to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: BAUD
VarI.Descr: Baud rate CAN, referred to enumerative COPM_BAUD_ENUM

VarI.Name: NODE
VarI.Descr: Master unique node in network, 1 to 127

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, refers to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, refers to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: NODE
VarI.Descr: Slave unique node in network, 1 to 127

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, refers to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: NODE
VarI.Descr: Corresponding slave node in network, 1 to 127

VarI.Name: CYCLE
VarI.Descr: Cycle time for rtr request, ms

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, refers to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: NODE
VarI.Descr: Corresponding slave node in network, 1 to 127

VarI.Name: ADDRIECTXMAPPINGTABLEADR
VarI.Descr: Address of the table of COPM_PLC_HDLR_STRUCT with Tx mappings

VarI.Name: ADDRIECRXMAPPINGTABLEADR
VarI.Descr: Address of the table of COPM_PLC_HDLR_STRUCT with Rx mappings

VarI.Name: ADDRPARAMTABLE
VarI.Descr: Address of the array of constant used to define param list

VarI.Name: NUMPARAMS
VarI.Descr: Number of records in the list

VarI.Name: CAN
VarI.Descr: CAN physical channel, refers to enumerative COPM_CHN_ENUM

VarI.Name: SKIPMASK
VarI.Descr: Skip nodes mask. Bit 0 first node in the network (by its position)

VarI.Name: SKIPMASKNUMBYTES
VarI.Descr: Number of bytes of the mask

Var.Name: NODE
Var.Descr: Corresponding slave node in network, 1 to 127

Var.Name: EVENT
Var.Descr: Event type, referred to enumerative COPM_EVETYP_ENUM

Var.Name: NUMSLOT
Var.Descr: Total number of messages in the CAN driver rx queue

Var.Name: LEVELMAX
Var.Descr: Maximum level reached of messages in the CAN driver rx queue

Var.Name: LEVELNOW
Var.Descr: Current level of messages in the CAN driver rx queue

Var.Name: OVERRUNCOUNT
Var.Descr: Number of overrun occurred in the CAN driver rx queue

Var.Name: CAN0_TXQUEUEFULL
Var.Descr: CAN driver tx queue full counter

Var.Name: NODE
Var.Descr: Slave unique node in network, 1 to 127

Var.Name: N_PRM
Var.Descr: Total number of Parametrization Slave Message

Var.Name: N_PDORX
Var.Descr: Total number of Receive Process Data Object

Var.Name: N_PDOTX
Var.Descr: Total number of Transmit Process Data Object

Var.Name: BOOTUPMSG
Var.Descr: Bootup msg has been reached by master

Var.Name: BOOTSTATUS
Var.Descr: Boot-up procedure status, referred to enumerative COPM_BOOTST_ENUM

Var.Name: BOOTRES
Var.Descr: Boot-up procedure result, referred to enumerative COPM_BOOTRES_ENUM

Var.Name: BOOTERR
Var.Descr: Boot-up procedure SDO result, referred to enumerative COPM_SDO_ABORT_ENUM

Var.Name: N_EMCY
Var.Descr: Total number of Emergency message received from node

Var.Name: N_PDORXSYNCREQUIRED
Var.Descr: Number of sync PDO required from node

Var.Name: N_PDORXSYNCRECEIVED
Var.Descr: Number of sync PDO received from node

Var.Name: PDORXSYNCMISSCOUNT
Var.Descr: Number of sync PDO missed from node

Var.Name: ERROR
Var.Descr: Last error, referred to enumerative COPM_ERROR_ENUM

Var.Name: USED
Var.Descr: Indicate if network is used in current configuration

Var.Name: CAN
Var.Descr: CAN physical channel, 0 for CAN-A, 1 for CAN-B

Var.Name: NODE
Var.Descr: CANopen Master unique node in network, 1 to 127

Var.Name: BAUD
Var.Descr: Baud rate CAN, referred to enumerative COPM_BAUD_ENUM

Var.Name: ACTIVE
Var.Descr: Indicate if network is used in current configuration

Var.Name: N_SLAVE_PRES
Var.Descr: CAN physical channel, 0 for CAN-A, 1 for CAN-B

Var.Name: RQSTOPNET
Var.Descr: CANopen Master unique node in network, 1 to 127

Var.Name: ISBUSOFF
Var.Descr: Network is in bus off condition

Var.Name: CFG
Var.Descr: True if default configuration has been applied

Var.Name: INITOK
Var.Descr: True if configuration has been applied and COPS has been inited, if false see errorCode

Var.Name: ERRORCODE
Var.Descr: Error code, if error in the startup process

Var.Name: DE07
Var.Descr: Type of stepper motor control [num] [0 -> FULL STEP, 1 -> HALF STEP, 2 -> RESERVED

Var.Name: N11
Var.Descr: Extra movement in full closure every n15 hours working [steps]

Var.Name: N26
Var.Descr: Periodical override mode [num] 0->after n15 period with Open_at_wr = 0, 1->after n15 period

Var.Name: N27
Var.Descr: Stepper motor windong maximum current (mA) during boosting phase RESERVED

Var.Name: N31
Var.Descr: Behaviour on power fail [num] 0 ->no action, an alarm is generated, 1->close

Var.Name: N32
Var.Descr: Unipolar W1+ allocation [num] 0 ->No redirection, 1 -> redirect to W1+, 2 -> redirect to W1-, 3 -> redirect to W2+, 4 -> redirect to W2-

Var.Name: N33
Var.Descr: Unipolar W1- allocation [num] 0 ->No redirection, 1 -> redirect to W1+, 2 -> redirect to W1-, 3 -> redirect to W2+, 4 -> redirect to W2-

Var.Name: N34
Var.Descr: Unipolar W2+ allocation [num] 0 ->No redirection, 1 -> redirect to W1+, 2 -> redirect to W1-, 3 -> redirect to W2+, 4 -> redirect to W2-

Var.Name: N35
Var.Descr: Unipolar W2- allocation [num] 0 ->No redirection, 1 -> redirect to W1+, 2 -> redirect to W1-, 3 -> redirect to W2+, 4 -> redirect to W2-

Var.Name: N36
Var.Descr: Number of Battery Backup modules [num] (only parameter of valve 1 is taken into account)

Var.Name: CHN
Var.Descr: Modbus master RTU channel, returned from sysMbMRtu_OpenChn

Var.Name: CFG
Var.Descr: Modbus slave is added to netlist

Var.Name: PRES
Var.Descr: Modbus slave is present on network

Var.Name: ACTIVE
Var.Descr: Modbus slave is concurrent in communication

Var.Name: NUMPARAMMSG
Var.Descr: Total number of Parametrization Slave Message

Var.Name: NUMQUEUEDMSG
Var.Descr: Total number of Configurated Slave Message

Var.Name: STATUS
Var.Descr: Modbus slave state machine, referred to enumerative MbStatus

Var.Name: ERROR
Var.Descr: Modbus slave last error, referred to enumerative MbError

Var.Name: EXCEPTION
Var.Descr: Modbus slave last exception, referred to enumerative MbException

Var.Name: DISABLEWRITE
Var.Descr: TRUE if write commands are disabled

Var.Name: CHN
Var.Descr: Modbus master RTU channel, returned from sysMbMRtu_OpenChn

Var.Name: NUMSLAVES
Var.Descr: Total number of Configurated Slave in Net list

Var.Name: STATUS
Var.Descr: Modbus master state machine, referred to enumerative MbStatus

Var.Name: ERROR
Var.Descr: Modbus master last error, referred to enumerative MbError

Var.Name: NUMMSG
Var.Descr: Total number of Configurated Broadcast and Single Slave Message

Var.Name: NUMBROADCASTMSG
Var.Descr: Total number of Configurated Broadcast Message

Var.Name: BUSMSGCOUNT
Var.Descr: Generic counter for messages successfully sent/received on the bus

Var.Name: BUSCOMMERRCOUNT
Var.Descr: Generic counter for failed messages sent/received on the bus

Var.Name: MESSAGECOUNT
Var.Descr: If master: counter of messages sent. If slave: counter of messages received

Var.Name: SLAVERSPNOACKCOUNT
Var.Descr: (Only if master) Counter of slave NAK response messages

Var.Name: SLAVERSPBUSYCOUNT
Var.Descr: (Only if master) Counter of slave BUSY response messages

Var.Name: ERRORID
Var.Descr: Error ID. This value MUST be lower than the minimum allowable value for the display

Var.Name: BLINKMODE
Var.Descr: Blinking: 0 = Blink OFF, 1 = Blink ON, 2 = Blink FAST

Var.Name: RUNNING
Var.Descr: CANopen Master entered in one of running state according to DSP302

Var.Name: N_SLAVE
Var.Descr: Total number of Configurated Slave in Net list

Var.Name: N_PRM
Var.Descr: Total number of Parametrization Slave Message

Var.Name: N_PDORX
Var.Descr: Total number of Receive Process Data Object

Var.Name: N_PDOTX
Var.Descr: Total number of Transmit Process Data Object

Var.Name: N_IECINP
Var.Descr: Total number of Input IEC Process Data Object

Var.Name: N_IECOUT
Var.Descr: Total number of Output IEC Process Data Object

Var.Name: ERROR
Var.Descr: Last error, referred to enumerative COPM_ERROR_ENUM

Var.Name: READYTOREBOOT
Var.Descr: Ready to reboot. All nodes have sent bootup message

Var.Name: RQSTART
Var.Descr: Start from stopped by user status

Var.Name: CANEXPPRESENCEBYPAR
Var.Descr: CANopen slave presence disable by parameter

Var.Name: MBMRTU_DISBYPAR
Var.Descr: Modbus RTU master disable by parameter
